title: Pasian’ Kha Siangtho Hong Kumsuk In

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pasian’ Kha Siangtho, hong kumsuk inla,
Ka lungsim siang semsem ding hong hei in;
Nang kong it ding bangin hong itsak in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nong deih, ka To Pasian in,
Pilna, thatang, kha, lungsim khempeuh tawh;
Nang mai hong zongin hong muzo sak aw.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nial nopna lungsimte hong zosak in,
ngakzo sak in thunget ngah lohna.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Van mite bang Nang kong it theih na’ngin;
pumpi’n itna siang hon zensak in;
Na Kha Siangtho sung kei hong phumta in,
